privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real NASA eCRM-001 OpenVSP model. The internal model units are natively in inches. The main 'Wing' component (ID XIUYSEMJCT) has an exact projected span of 452.07 inches (~11.48 meters), a planform area of 24,597.8 square inches (~15.87 square meters), an aspect ratio of ~8.31, and a mean aerodynamic chord (MAC) of roughly 55 inches (~1.4 meters). Agents must correctly extract the raw values from the DegenGeom CSV and explicitly convert them to metric units to accurately report the physical dimensions and satisfy the verifier's strict bounds. The output path and result file configurations match the task instructions perfectly.
